case_title: SHANNA WAGNOR ET AL VS. MATTHEW L GROZA

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: OCT-15-2019 FEE FOR SERIVCE $40.00 AS TO DEFENDANT GROZA, MATTHEW L
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE OF OEX. MATTER CONTINUED TO JANUARY 13, 2020 AT 11:00 A.M.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-13-2020 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-16-2020 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. THIS CASE IS CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION AND BY THE REQUEST OF THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO MAR-10-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. HONORABLE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II ALLOWS THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION HEARING TO BE STAYED PENDING THE CLARIFICATION OF THE JUDGMENT FILED ON APR-22-2019 AND THE DEFINITION OF SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES AFTER THE JUDGMENT: SPECIFICALLY, THE PHOTOGRAPHY FROM THE DRONE. JUDGMENT CREDITORS SHANNA WAGNOR AND SEAN LEWIS ARE PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR MATTHEW L. GROZA IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR AN OEX HEARING ON MARCH 30, 2020 AT 11:00 A.M. BY THE COURT. THE OEX HEARING OF MARCH 16, 2020 IS CONTINUED THAT DAY. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF APR-22-2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS ONLY, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2019 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO DEC-09-2019 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SHANNA WAGNOR IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF SEAN LEWIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MATTHEW L GROZA IS NOT PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO HEARING. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE DEC 9TH ORDER OF EXAMINATION HEARING IF SETTLEMENT IS NOT MET. IF NO APPEARNANCE AT THE NEXT HEARING THE MATTER WILL BE TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-09-2019 IS CONTINUED TO JAN-13-2020 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: BENCH LETTER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 12/09/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED - RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS - OEX CONTINUED ORDER (FOR JUN-25-2020 HEARING DATE - CONTINUED TO SEP-17-2020) RETURNED. SENT TO: PLAINTIFF - SEAN LEWIS; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD)

SMALL CLAIMS - OEX CONTINUED ORDER (FOR JUN-25-2020 HEARING DATE - CONTINUED TO SEP-17-2020) RETURNED. SENT TO: PLAINTIFF - SHANNA WAGNOR; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF EXAMINATION - OFF CALENDAR ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 09/17/2020. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ORDER RE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT ON SETTLEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-16-2020 IS CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-30-2020 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PURSUANT TO THE MOTION HEARING ON MARCH 10, 2020, COURT CONTINUES THE CURRENTLY SET OEX HEARING TO MARCH 30, 2020. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PRODUCE ANY DRONE FOOTAGE HE MAY HAVE OR ANY INDIVIDUAL THAT WAS WORKING WITH HIM ON THAT DAY TO ATTEST TO THE FACT THAT THERE IS NO DRONE FOOTAGE AVAILABLE. IF NO FUTHER EVIDENCE CAN BE PROVIDED TO PROVE THERE IS NO FOOTAGE, COURT WILL AMEND THE CURRENT JUDGMENT TO $1417.00 AS PREVIOUSLY AGREED TO BY PARTIES, OTHERWISE DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO GIVE PLAINTIFFS THE DRONE FOOTAGE THAT HE HAS AND THE CURRENT JUDGMENT WILL BE CONSIDERED SATISFIED.
RETURN MAIL - O.E.X. CONTINUE ORDER SENT TO DEFENDANT, UNABLE TO FOWARD.
RETURN MAIL - O.E.X. CONTINUE ORDER SENT TO PLAINTIFF, UNABLE TO FOWARD.
RETURN MAIL: O.E.X. CONTINE ORDER SENT TO PLAINTIFF, UNABLE TO FORWARD.
RETURN MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER, UNABLE TO FORWARD SENT TO PLAINTIFF

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-17-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED MAR-05-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GROZA, MATTHEW L

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WAGNOR, SHANNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GROZA, MATTHEW L $4,251.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,341.00, CO-PLAINTIFF SEAN LEWIS IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: SHANNA WAGNOR; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - UNCLAIMED - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT GROZA, MATTHEW L HEARING SET FOR NOV-04-2019 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

REMOVED FROM SMALL CLAIMS MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-10-2020 IN DEPT. 506 - PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR SHANNA WAGONER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR MATTHEW L. GORZA IS PRESENT. COURT ORDERS PARTIES TO APPEAR FOR AN ORDER OF EXAMINATION HEARING ON MARCH 30, 2020 AT 11:00 A.M. THE CURRENT OEX OF MARCH 16, 2020 IS CONTINUED TO THIS DATE. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PRODUCE ANY DRONE FOOTAGE HE MAY HAVE OR ANY INDIVIDUAL THAT WAS WORKING WITH HIM ON THAT DAY TO PROVE THAT THERE IS NO DRONE FOOTAGE AVAILABLE. IF NO FUTHER EVIDENCE CAN BE PROVIDED TO PROVE THERE IS NO FOOTAGE, COURT WILL AMEND THE CURRENT JUDGMENT TO $1417.00 AS PREVIOUSLY AGREED TO BY PARTIES, OTHERWISE DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO GIVE THE PLAINTIFFS THE DRONE FOOTAGE THAT HE HAS AND THE CURRENT JUDGMENT WILL BE CONSIDERED SATISFIED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506).
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-30-2020 IS CONTINUED TO PRESENT ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO MAY-18-2020 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY ORDER OF THE COURT. (506/JR)
RETURN MAIL O.E.X. CONTINUE ORDER - SENT TO DEFENDANT / UNABLE TO FORWARD -
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-18-2020 IS CONTINUED TO JUN-25-2020 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER RE: OEX OFF CALENDAR. NO APPEARANCE BY PARTIES.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2019 - JUDGMENT.
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR MOTION TO CLARIFY JUDGMENT AND DEFINE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. HEARING SET FOR MAR-10-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: OEX CONTINUED ORDER MAILED TO SHANNA WAGNOR ON 01/13/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: OEX CONTINUED ORDER MAILED TO SEAN LEWIS ON 01/13/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,251.00 FILED BY WAGNOR, SHANNA LEWIS, SEAN AS TO DEFENDANT GROZA, MATTHEW L ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
RETURN MAIL - BENCH LETTER SENT TO PLAINTIFF, UNABLE TO FOWARD.
RETURN MAIL , SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER, SENT TO PLAINTIFF, UNABLE TO FORWARD.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-25-2020 IS CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-17-2020 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF EXAMINATION OFF CALENDAR ORDER MAILED TO SEAN LEWIS ON 08/31/2020. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
